title: Week 11 - 排序算法二与排序应用
description: 练习向有序数组中插入一个值。

questions.title: 把新分数插入有序列表

description.statement: 将 newScore 插入已经从小到大排序的数组，并返回新的有序数组。
description.input: 一个有序数组表和一个新分数。

questions.reference_code:
function solution(scores, newScore)
    local result = {}
    local index = 1
    local inserted = false
    for i = 1, #scores do
        if not inserted and newScore < scores[i] then
            result[index] = newScore
            index = index + 1
            inserted = true
        end
        result[index] = scores[i]
        index = index + 1
    end
    if not inserted then
        result[index] = newScore
    end
    return result
end
